prompt: A massive, crushing block of brutalist, weathered iron with deep rust textures hangs agonizingly close to a pristine, polished floor of fragile porcelain. The impossibly heavy block is suspended only by hundreds of microscopic, fraying silk threads that are visibly snapping under the immense tension. Dramatic, low-key lighting with a single harsh spotlight, creating profound shadows. A tangible sense of unbearable weight and imminent, catastrophic failure. No text, no charts, no numbers. High-resolution photo.
dataset_name: SIPRI Military Expenditure Database (via Our World in Data)
insight: In 2024, United States military spending alone reached $968 billion, a massive, crushing financial weight suspended precariously over the fragile foundations of global peace.
